DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/ai-search/.description: Deletes a file from a managed AI Search instance and triggers a reindex.

parameters.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.description: Namespace name
parameters.name: name

400.description: This operation requires a managed instance.

name.description: Namespace to use for this operation.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/ai-search/nam.description: Lists indexed items in an AI Search instance.

parameters.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.description: Sort order for items. "status" (default) sorts by status priority then last_seen_at. "modified_at" sorts by file modification time (most recent first), falling back to created_at.
parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort order for items. "status" (default) sorts by status priority then last_seen_at. "modified_at" sorts by file modification time (most recent first), falling back to created_at.

parameters.description: Filter items by source_id. Use "builtin" for uploaded files, or a source identifier like "web-crawler:https://example.com".
parameters.name: source

schema.description: Filter items by source_id. Use "builtin" for uploaded files, or a source identifier like "web-crawler:https://example.com".

parameters.description: JSON-encoded metadata filter using Vectorize filter syntax. Examples: {"folder":"reports/"}, {"timestamp":{"$gte":1700000000000}}, {"folder":{"$in":["docs/","reports/"]}}
parameters.name: metadata_filter

schema.description: JSON-encoded metadata filter using Vectorize filter syntax. Examples: {"folder":"reports/"}, {"timestamp":{"$gte":1700000000000}}, {"folder":{"$in":["docs/","reports/"]}}

parameters.description: Filter items by their unique ID. Returns at most one item.
parameters.name: item_id

schema.description: Filter items by their unique ID. Returns at most one item.

parameters.description: Filter items by their exact key (object key / filename). Keys are unique per source, so combine with `source` to disambiguate across data sources.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: Filter items by their exact key (object key / filename). Keys are unique per source, so combine with `source` to disambiguate across data sources.

parameters.description: Namespace name
parameters.name: name

metadata.description: Built-in, configured filterable, and retained source metadata for the item.

source_id.description: Identifies which data source this item belongs to. "builtin" for uploaded files, "{type}:{source}" for external sources, null for legacy items.

503.description: Unable to connect to ai search.

name.description: Namespace to use for this operation.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.description: Namespace name
parameters.name: name

metadata.description: Built-in, configured filterable, and retained source metadata for the item.

source_id.description: Identifies which data source this item belongs to. "builtin" for uploaded files, "{type}:{source}" for external sources, null for legacy items.

200.description: Returns a AI Search Item detail.

503.description: Unable to connect to ai search.

name.description: Namespace to use for this operation.

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.name: name

200.description: Returns the AI Search item chunks with text content.

PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/ai-search/n.description: Syncs an item to an AI Search instance index.

parameters.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.description: Namespace name
parameters.name: name

wait_for_completion.description: Wait for indexing to fully complete before responding. On RAGs with vector indexing enabled, this additionally waits for Vectorize ingestion confirmation (up to 40s) so the returned item reflects a queryable state. On timeout the item is returned in `running` state and the background alarm continues polling. Defaults to false.

metadata.description: Built-in, configured filterable, and retained source metadata for the item.

source_id.description: Identifies which data source this item belongs to. "builtin" for uploaded files, "{type}:{source}" for external sources, null for legacy items.

200.description: Returns a AI Search Item detail.

name.description: Namespace to use for this operation.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/ai-search/na.description: Uploads a file to a managed AI Search instance via multipart/form-data.

parameters.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: AI Search instance ID. Lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.description: Namespace name
parameters.name: name

file.description: The file to upload. Filename must not exceed 128 characters.

metadata.description: JSON string of custom metadata key-value pairs.

wait_for_completion.description: Wait for indexing to fully complete before responding. On RAGs with vector indexing enabled, this additionally waits for Vectorize ingestion confirmation (up to 40s) so the returned item reflects a queryable state. On timeout the item is returned in `running` state and the background alarm continues polling. Defaults to false.

metadata.description: Built-in, configured filterable, and retained source metadata for the item.

source_id.description: Identifies which data source this item belongs to. "builtin" for uploaded files, "{type}:{source}" for external sources, null for legacy items.

name.description: Namespace to use for this operation.

parameters.name: name

key.description: Item key / filename. Must not exceed 128 characters.

wait_for_completion.description: Wait for indexing to fully complete before responding. On RAGs with vector indexing enabled, this additionally waits for Vectorize ingestion confirmation (up to 40s) so the returned item reflects a queryable state. On timeout the item is returned in `running` state and the background alarm continues polling. Defaults to false.

metadata.description: Built-in, configured filterable, and retained source metadata for the item.

source_id.description: Identifies which data source this item belongs to. "builtin" for uploaded files, "{type}:{source}" for external sources, null for legacy items.

200.description: Returns a AI Search Item detail.
